Close SH-DET-01 by fixing selfhost source compile call indices, teaching auto-rooting that root_pop is immediate, refreshing the affected bootstrap expectations, and updating the stale wasm snapshots that full cargo test exposed.

Convert console app to Teams MCP server (#7)

* Add Teams MCP server

Convert the starter console app into a local stdio MCP server backed by ModelContextProtocol and Microsoft Graph delegated auth. This adds Teams chat listing and messaging tools, replaces the starter tests with Teams-focused coverage, and documents local MCP setup.

* Fix MTP coverage in CI

Update the build workflow to use Microsoft.Testing.Platform coverage flags instead of the old VSTest --collect option so pull request test runs succeed and still emit Cobertura coverage output for ReportGenerator.

commit.message:
feat(llm): add context window budget and session cost management (#106)

* feat(llm): add context window budget and session cost management

Implements S07 context window management (AC-07.3) and cost management
(AC-07.5):

Context Window Budget (context_budget.py):
- Priority-based chunk system (P0=system/safety, P1=recent turns,
  P2=world state, P3=extended history)
- Truncates P3→P2 when over budget, never P0/P1
- Conservative token counting (~4 chars/token with 10% safety margin)

Session Cost Management (cost.py, llm_guard.py):
- Per-session cost accumulation with DB persistence
- 80% warning threshold, 100% hard cap (configurable)
- Budget enforcement in guarded_llm_call (pre-call check)
- Post-call cost recording via LLMCostTracker
- BudgetExceededError raised when cap hit

Infrastructure:
- Alembic migration 008: adds total_cost_usd, cost_warning_sent to
  game_sessions
- Prometheus counters: llm_cost_total, session_cost_exceeded,
  context_chunks_dropped
- Config: session_cost_warn_pct, turn_cost_cap_usd

Tests: 19 new tests + 2 existing tests updated (29 total passing)

Closes #104, Closes #105

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: address all 9 review comments on context/cost (PR #106)

- Fix tiered truncation algorithm (P3→P2 iterative removal)
- Wire all Prometheus counters (cost, context drops, session exceeded)
- Use provider-reported cost_usd when available
- Enforce turn_cost_cap_usd in llm_guard
- Seed cost tracker from DB at turn start
- Persist turn costs via accumulate_session_cost after pipeline
- Mark cost_warning_sent when threshold reached

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: theinterneti <theinterneti@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(backend): GIN_MODE未設定時にリリースモードをデフォルトに設定

- デバッグモードではルーティング情報等が標準出力に表示されるため、本番環境で情報漏洩リスクあり
- GIN_MODE環境変数が未設定の場合、自動的にリリースモードに設定
- 開発時はGIN_MODE=debugを.envに設定することで従来通りデバッグ出力を確認可能

commit.message:
fix(backend): 内部エラーのクライアント漏洩を防止しエラーハンドリングを改善

- err.Error() をJSONレスポンスに返していた箇所を汎用メッセージに変更
- handleServiceError() ヘルパー関数を導入し、エラー種別で適切なHTTPステータスを返却
  - context.Canceled → 499 (Client Closed Request)
  - context.DeadlineExceeded → 504 (Gateway Timeout)
  - gorm.ErrRecordNotFound → 404 (Not Found)
  - その他 → 500 (Internal Server Error)
- 内部エラーはサーバーログに出力し、クライアントには漏洩しない
- テストケースを追加: DB障害時の500返却、エラーメッセージ漏洩検証

Closes #77

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: support running personal_mtproxy on back node in split-mode setup

pm_registry now broadcasts mtp_policy_table updates to all front nodes
instead of calling the local process directly. This makes DETS the single
source of truth in multi-front deployments: any front that (re)connects
gets the full subdomain list replayed automatically.

Changes:
- pm_registry: replace direct mtp_policy_table calls with broadcast_policy/3
  which erpc-calls every cached front node
- pm_registry: monitor_nodes(true) in init; nodeup/nodedown handlers
  maintain a front_nodes cache (checked via whereis(mtp_policy_table))
- pm_registry: refresh_fronts/0 — re-scans nodes() and replays into any
  newly discovered fronts; useful after split-brain recovery
- personal_mtproxy_app: cowboy_listen_addr/0 gives a clear error when
  domain_fronting is absent and no explicit listen addr is configured
  (required on back nodes which don't have domain_fronting)
- README: split-mode setup section with front and back config snippets

Back node requires ports in sys.config (personal_mtproxy reads port +
secret for link generation; mtproto_proxy ignores it on back nodes).
Front nodes run vanilla mtproto_proxy; domain_fronting must point to
the back node's Cowboy address, not localhost.

Compatible with node_role = both (degenerates to a local erpc call,
no behaviour change for single-node deployments).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add 'Why long sequences are hard' subsection to frequency intuition

Covers quadratic attention cost, diluted softmax signal, optimization
difficulty, and batch size constraints. Clarifies that sinusoidal PE
scales fine — the real bottlenecks are attention complexity and
training logistics. Notes learned PE's extrapolation ceiling.

commit.message:
Initial commit: Complete Spring Boot License Renewal Application

- Implement full license file management system for Windows shares
- Add SMB/CIFS support for reading/writing license files
- Create license validation with expiry date checks
- Implement timestamped backup system
- Add file renaming with date-time stamps for audit trail
- Develop REST API endpoints for renewal and status checking
- Include comprehensive logging and error handling
- Configure Spring Boot application with customizable settings
- Add complete documentation and configuration guide
- Set up Maven build with Spring Boot 3.2.5

Features:
* Read/write license files from Windows network shares
* Validate license expiry dates and trigger renewal
* Create timestamped backups before renewal
* Rename old license files with audit timestamps
* Generate new licenses with updated expiry dates
* REST endpoints: /api/license/renew, /api/license/status, /api/license/health
* Detailed logging for troubleshooting
* Spring Boot Actuator integration

commit.message:
Add per-case timeout (600s) to prevent batch hangs

Root cause: 2 cases had API calls hang for 53min due to TCP-level
stalls that bypassed httpx timeout. These blocked semaphore slots
and froze the entire batch.

Fix: wrap each case evaluation in asyncio.wait_for(timeout=600).
Cases exceeding 10min are logged and skipped.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add VLCJ video support and Chart Editor (채보도구)

Feature 1: VLCJ video background support
- Add vlcj 4.12.1 and vlcj-natives 4.12.0 dependencies
- Add videoFile field to Chart data class
- Create VideoPlayer wrapping VLCJ with graceful LibVLC fallback
- Integrate VideoPlayer into StellarStepGame lifecycle
- Integrate video playback into GameplayScreen (show/hide/render)

Feature 2: Chart authoring tool
- Add CHART EDITOR menu item to MainMenuScreen
- Create ChartWriter for normalizing and saving chart.json
- Create ChartEditorSetupScreen for metadata entry
- Create ChartRecordingScreen for real-time note capture
- Create ChartEditorSaveScreen for save confirmation

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: binder grid view with 9-pocket page layout (#29)

New BinderView component showing cards in 3x3 grid pages (2x3 mobile)
with page navigation, checked/unchecked visual states, and card
thumbnails. Added as Binder tab in App.tsx.

Fixes from rubber duck review applied: useEffect for media query
listener (not useState), page clamping in useEffect (not during render).

Closes #13
Supersedes #23

commit.message:
Add ProcessWrapper activity tracing

Create a ProcessWrapper ActivitySource and emit a process.execute activity for running processes. Include the executable path and exit code tags, set error status when validation fails, and cover the new tracing behavior with tests.
